raw_consumer_statement: ON XX/XX/year> CITI CLOSE MY DISPUTE WITHOUT PROPER INVESTIGATION THE REASON IS " FORGEIN COUNTRY '' I LIVE IN PUERTO RICO IS PART OF USA I FEEL THEYRE DISCRIMINATE AGAINST US IM VERY DISSAPOINTED BECAUSE WHEN THEY FIRST SENT DOCUMENTS TO FILL OUT ON OR BEFORE XX/XX/year> I FILL OUT ALL PAPERWORK THAT WAS REQUESTED AND BEFORE THEY REQUESTED INFO THEY DIDNT CHECK MY ADDRESS
